untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a pre-computed stationary time series (e.g., detrended price, normalized oscillator) as input. The allowed indicator list does not include generic custom indicators or user-defined stationary transformations. The threshold value of 75 suggests a normalized 0-100 scale indicator, but without knowing the exact transformation applied, this cannot be reliably mapped to RSI, Stochastic, or other available indicators. To implement this rule, either: (1) specify the exact stationary transformation (e.g., 'RSI(14)', 'Normalized Price Position'), or (2) add the pre-computed stationary series as an available indicator.
